title: NEJ TIL NEUTRONBOMBEN FREDSCENTRET GIRO 4 10 66 44
description: This Danish protest button features a target with a family silhouette at the center of the yellow bullseye. The text 'NEJ TIL NEUTRONBOMBEN' translates to 'No to the Neutron Bomb.' The button was issued by Fredscentret (The Peace Center).
